title: Anisophyllum fendleri
taxonomy: Anisophyllum fendleri is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is native to Mexico and is a type of cactus. Anisophyllum fendleri has been classified as a synonym of Pediocactus fendleri, but its classification may vary depending on the source. As a member of the Cactaceae family, Anisophyllum fendleri is closely related to other species of cacti. The exact classification of this plant may require further research and verification.
